title: Lightly Carved Norwegian Cabbage Salad
description: A romantic and keto-friendly dish featuring lightly carved cabbage with umami flavors from caramelized onions and bacon for a light meal.

ingredients.name: 1 large head of cabbage
ingredients.notes: Rinse under cold water to remove any dirt or grit.

ingredients.name: 3 thinly sliced shallots
ingredients.notes: For added sweetness and umami flavor.

ingredients.name: 1-2 small red onions
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of sweetness.

ingredients.name: 5 slices bacon, cut into small pieces
ingredients.notes: To infuse the dish with smoky umami flavors.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.notes: For caramelizing onions and dressing the salad.

instructions: In a pan, add sliced shallots and chopped red onions. Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle salt, and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add bacon pieces to the onion mixture and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes or until the bacon is crisp.
Remove from heat and set aside to cool slightly.

Place quarters of cabbage on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle lightly with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Roast in oven for about 10-15 minutes, flipping once halfway through roasting.
To serve, place roasted cabbage leaves onto individual plates or salad bowls. Top each leaf with caramelized onion and bacon mixture. Serve immediately as a light and fresh side dish.
